headline: How The Meta Platforms (META) Story Is Shifting With AI Spending Legal Risks And Valuation
summary: Meta Platforms is working with a slightly trimmed fair value estimate of US$829.23, down from US$835.54, as updated model inputs filter through to the headline price target. This adjustment sits alongside a busy period of analyst debate around AI spending, legal risks and potential cost actions, all influencing how firms frame upside versus risk for the stock. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives can help you track and interpret the evolving story around...

headline: Wells Fargo Advisors Adds to String of New Recruits With $1.6 Billion UBS Team
summary: BEST PRACTICES   Wells Fargo’s brokerage unit recruited another financial advisor team that oversaw $1.6 billion in client assets at UBS adding to Wells Fargo’s string of recent hires. The team, called AGT Private Wealth Group, joined Wells Fargo in Frisco, Texas on Friday.

headline: HSBC Results Disappoint With Surprise $400 Million Charge on MFS

headline: Senator Thom Tillis Says 'We Respectfully Agree To Disagree' After Banking Industry Criticizes Stablecoin Yield Compromise
summary: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) defended on Monday, April 4, the bipartisan compromise on stablecoin yields in the Clarity Act, deeming it a "substantially improved, consensus-based " cryptocurrency legislation.
